connection_params.name: api_base_url
connection_params.description: NextTrend REST API base URL (e.g., http://localhost:3011/api/v1)

connection_params.name: api_key
connection_params.description: NextTrend API key (ntv1_ prefix). Requires at least read:tags and read:history scopes.

connection_params.name: username
connection_params.description: NextTrend username for JWT authentication. Used when api_key is not provided.

connection_params.name: poll_interval_ms
connection_params.description: Interval between tag value collection polls.

connection_params.name: history_query_limit
connection_params.description: Maximum data points per history query.

connection_params.name: tag_prefix_filter
connection_params.description: Only collect tags matching this path prefix (e.g., WH/WHK01/). Empty means all tags.

connection_params.name: connect_timeout_ms
connection_params.description: HTTP connection timeout for NextTrend API requests.

connection_params.name: request_timeout_ms
connection_params.description: HTTP request timeout for NextTrend API requests.

metadata.notes: First HISTORIAN-tier Forge adapter. Cross-language spoke: Python adapter wraps Rust REST API. Supports live SSE streaming and historical backfill via time-range queries.
